# Taher Mahram — Software Engineer

## About
Taher Mahram is a software engineer specializing in backend development and AI systems, based in Sana'a, Yemen. Available for freelance and remote opportunities.

## Expertise
- Backend & Systems: Python, Django, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, SQLite, Microservices, System Design, DDD, Multi-tenancy, RBAC, REST API
- AI & LLM Engineering: LangChain, RAG Pipelines, Chroma, FAISS, OpenAI, Prompt Engineering, Guardrails
- Cloud & DevOps: AWS, Docker, CI/CD, Celery, Rate Limiting, Observability
- Frontend & Data: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS

## Experience
- Software Engineer at Neo Platrix (Hopofy) — Jan 2024 to Present
- Founder & Software Engineer at Pixova Agency — Nov 2022 to Dec 2023
- Web Application Developer Intern at Khebrat Technology — Mar 2022 to Aug 2022

## Education
B.Sc. in Computer Science (Software Development), with Honors — Universiti Teknikal Malaysia Melaka (UTeM), 2018–2022

## Key Facts
- Based in Sana'a, Yemen
- Speaks Arabic (native) and English (professional)
- Available for remote and freelance work
- Specializes in Django/Python backend systems and LLM integration
